title: Common workspace failure modes and fixes
snippet:
@@ -20,3 @@ (19 before, 0 after)

When the index reports no compiled knowledge, the workspace has not been compiled yet; run the compile pass first. When a database lock error appears, another process holds the workspace state file. These are the two most common operator failure modes and their fixes.

title: Transformer attention mechanism
snippet:
@@ -20,3 @@ (19 before, 0 after)

The transformer attention mechanism computes scaled dot-product attention over query, key, and value matrices. Self-attention lets the model weigh sequence positions when producing each output representation. This is a frozen fixture used by the key-free nightly smoke to exercise the curator pip...

title: CLI command dispatch and Result-typed handlers
snippet:
@@ -20,3 @@ (19 before, 0 after)

The CLI entry point parses subcommands and dispatches to handlers. Each command returns a Result type rather than throwing, so the top-level handler maps errors to friendly messages and exit codes. The deterministic control plane owns durable state; the model only proposes.
